title: Sumi Baptist Church
tagline: Sumi Baptist Church — spiritual town of Nagaland

overview.short: Sümi Baptist Church, Zünheboto is a Baptist church located in Zünheboto, Nagaland, India.
overview.description: Sümi Baptist Church, Zünheboto is a Baptist church located in Zünheboto, Nagaland, India. It is affiliated with the Nagaland Baptist Church Council. The church is considered to be one of the largest church buildings in Asia. The church can accommodate over 8,500 people.

topPlaces.name: Zünheboto
topPlaces.description: Zünheboto (), also known as Zünhebo, is a town located in the Indian state of Nagaland. Zünheboto is inhabited by the Sümi Nagas.

topPlaces.name: Aghunato
topPlaces.description: Aghunato is a subdivision of the Zünheboto District of Nagaland, India. It has its own constituency in the state assembly and had 15,659 registered voters in the 2013 elections.

topPlaces.name: Akuluto
topPlaces.description: Akuluto is a town and Subdivision in the Zünheboto District of Nagaland, India. There are a total of 10 villages under Akuluto Subdivision.

topPlaces.name: Pughoboto
topPlaces.description: Pughoboto (Pron:/ˌzʌnˈhiːbəʊtəʊ/) is a town and a town area committee in the Zünheboto District of the Indian state of Nagaland. It is one of the oldest subdivisions in Nagaland, India.

items.note: Zünheboto (), also known as Zünhebo, is a town located in the Indian state of Nagaland. Zünheboto is inhabited by the Sümi Nagas.
Aghunato is a subdivision of the Zünheboto District of Nagaland, India. It has its own constituency in the state assembly and had 15,659 registered voters in the 2013 elections.
Akuluto is a town and Subdivision in the Zünheboto District of Nagaland, India. There are a total of 10 villages under Akuluto Subdivision.
Pughoboto (Pron:/ˌzʌnˈhiːbəʊtəʊ/) is a town and a town area committee in the Zünheboto District of the Indian state of Nagaland. It is one of the oldest subdivisions in Nagaland, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sumi Baptist Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sumi Baptist Church is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sumi Baptist Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dimapur Airport (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sumi Baptist Church?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sumi Baptist Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sumi Baptist Church?
faq.a: Stays in Sumi Baptist Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sumi Baptist Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Zünheboto, Aghunato, Akuluto, Pughoboto.
